title: verbascum sublobatum
intro: Verbascum sublobatum, also known as the mullein sublobatum, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the mullein family. It is a biennial plant with large, ovate leaves and tall spikes of yellow flowers, commonly found in dry, mountainous areas. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to soothe sore throats, coughs, and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Verbascum sublobatum are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation.
